text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Cognitive Inclusion Design to a concrete case.

section.title: Loan-application onboarding

example.code:
## Surface: loan-application-flow
Patterns: - chunking: 5 steps × ≤4 fields each (Step 1: identity → Step 2: address → ...) - predictability: button label `Submit application` (not `Next`); confirm before deletion - escape_hatch: 'Save and exit' on every step; resume from same step
Settings exposed: - focus_mode (hides side ads), dyslexia_font (OpenDyslexic), reduced_motion (OS-aware), extended_time (+50% timers), plain_language (Grade 5-6)
WCAG: 2.4.8 (location), 3.2.4 (consistency), 2.2.1 (timing), 2.3.3 (animation), 3.1.5 (reading level).

section.note: Every pattern + setting is explicit; WCAG mapping makes the spec auditable.
